scenarios.description: Pack cleanmatic:product-spec into a versioned tar.gz with deterministic SHA256.

safety_check on a synthetic repo containing .env + .git emits warn-level findings without exposing content. Root is generated at runtime because .env* paths are gitignored (root .gitignore line 44) and cannot be committed.
scenarios.note: eval/fixtures/dirty-claude/ cannot be a committed fixture: .env would be excluded by .gitignore (.env* pattern), making the scenario fail on a fresh checkout. The runner must create a temp directory, write the files listed in 'setup', and substitute the temp path for {{RUNTIME_ROOT}} in args before invoking the script.
assertions: no file content echoed to stdout/stderr
generated YAML starts with '# Generated by cleanmatic:claude-pack'
pack --dry-run does NOT create tar.gz file
